org_constraint: The plan should consist of exactly five sections, with each section containing at least three sentences.
new_constraint: The plan must contain at most 14 sentences.

To create exactly five sections with at least three sentences each, you would require a minimum of fifteen sentences total, since 5 multiplied by 3 equals 15. This necessary minimum exceeds your stated maximum limit of fourteen sentences, making it impossible to satisfy all conditions simultaneously. You may choose to increase the sentence limit to at least fifteen, or you could reduce the minimum sentence requirement to two for certain sections to fit within the fourteen-sentence cap. Please let me know which adjustment would be most helpful so I can refine the proposed schedule accordingly.<|im_end|>
